sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32770" key="e)kpropi/ptw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκπρο-πίπτω</orth>, <sense id="n32770.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fall down from,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑψόθεν εἰς γαῖαν</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0579.tlg003:324" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">324</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
